name: Prepayment Calculator
description: See how a lump-sum prepayment impacts your loan balance and remaining payments.
formula: Calculates remaining balance after making a prepayment, based on EMI amortization.
formulaDescription: Estimates how much extra you reduce from your loan balance with a one-time prepayment after some years of repayment.

example.explanation: After 3 years of payments on a ₹5,00,000 loan at 7.5%, the balance is about ₹3.64L. A ₹50,000 prepayment lowers it to ₹3.14L.

faqs.question: Does this change my EMI?
faqs.answer: This calculator assumes EMI stays the same and shows how your remaining balance drops. Your lender may offer to reduce EMI or tenure.
